purpose: Identify a safe, explicit manual STOP drill target before any STOP drill pass claim can exist.
valid_target_examples: a manually started disposable dry-run preview process
a non-production test command intentionally started by Anthony
a documented simulated condition that can be stopped without touching runtime, queue, scheduler, SOS, broker, secrets, or live trading

current_decision.reason_confirmation_phrase_blocked: No explicit manual STOP drill target has been selected and observed yet.

required_before_using_phrase: Anthony selects the exact manual STOP drill target
Anthony confirms the target is disposable or non-production
Anthony confirms no live trading, broker, SOS, scheduler, queue, inbox, command queue, secret, or credential path will be touched
Anthony performs or reviews the manual STOP drill
Anthony verifies all dangerous flags remain false
safe_next_action: Anthony selects a specific manual STOP drill target or declines the STOP drill and remains blocked.
stop_condition: Stop before claiming STOP drill pass, killing processes, launching runtime, executing runtime, mutating queues, sending SOS, registering scheduler, touching credentials, writing secrets, enabling live trading, or setting vacation_mode_complete true.
